# Data Center Rack Power Distribution Unit Market (2026 - 2033) Size, Share & Trends Analysis Report By Rack Type (Non-intelligent, Intelligent (Metered, Switched)), By Region (North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Latin America, Middle East & Africa), And Segment Forecasts

- Report ID: GVR-1-68038-830-5
- Number of Report Pages: 120
- Format: PDF

- Historical Range: 2021 - 2025
- Forecast Period: 2026 - 2033
- Industry: Technology

## Data Center Rack Power Distribution Unit Market Summary

The global data center rack power distribution unit market size was estimated at USD 2.81 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 5.87 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 9.7% from 2026 to 2033. The growth of high-performance computing (HPC), artificial intelligence (AI), and GPU-intensive workloads is driving demand for data center rack power distribution unit market.

### Key Market Trends & Insights

- North America held 38.0% revenue share of the global data center rack power distribution unit market.
- In the U.S., the expansion of colocation data centers is accelerating the demand for data center rack power distribution unit market.
- By rack type, non-intelligent segment held the largest revenue share in 2025.

### Market Size & Forecast

- 2025 Market Size: USD 2.81 Billion
- 2033 Projected Market Size: USD 5.87 Billion
- CAGR (2026-2033): 9.7%
- North America: Largest market in 2025
- Asia Pacific: Fastest grow

The global power distribution unit market is estimated to experience significant growth over the forecast period. This growth can be attributed to higher awareness of cloud computing, quick server adoption, and increased spending in industrial projects. Key trends in the power distribution unit (PDU) market are increased competition among vendors, cloud computing, evolution of alternating phased power and virtualization which are estimated to boost market growth through the forecast period.

Proliferating data center demand, reduced power consumption, rapid increase in the amount of data generated coupled with growing need for data storage are some of the key factors expected to drive the market. However, increasing data center server complexity is a major challenge faced by the PDU market.

Intelligent PDU

# Intelligent PDU

Publisher Global Industry Analysts

Published Oct 01, 2025

Length 192 Pages

SKU # GJOB20484421

Print

## Description

Global Intelligent PDU Market to Reach US$3.2 Billion by 2030

The global market for Intelligent PDU estimated at US$2.1 Billion in the year 2024, is expected to reach US$3.2 Billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 6.8% over the analysis period 2024-2030. Dual Circuit PDU, one of the segments analyzed in the report, is expected to record a 5.3% CAGR and reach US$219.1 Million by the end of the analysis period. Growth in the Hot Swap PDU segment is estimated at 7.8% CAGR over the analysis period.

The U.S. Market is Estimated at US$579.7 Million While China is Forecast to Grow at 6.4% CAGR

The Intelligent PDU market in the U.S. is estimated at US$579.7 Million in the year 2024. China, the world`s second largest economy, is forecast to reach a projected market size of US$498.2 Million by the year 2030 trailing a CAGR of 6.4% over the analysis period 2024-2030. Among the other noteworthy geographic markets are Japan and Canada, each forecast to grow at a CAGR of 6.2% and 5.6% respectively over the analysis period. Within Europe, Germany is forecast to grow at approximately 5.2% CAGR.
